name: Lexington Coleslaw\butel
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate or thinly slice the cabbage.
2. In a small saucepan, combine the sugar and vinegar. Cook over medium heat until the sugar dissolves.
3. Whisk in the remaining ingredients (ketchup, water, cayenne, crushed red chile, black pepper, salt) and simmer over medium-high heat for 10 minutes.
4. If the mixture is too thick, thin it with 1 tablespoon of warm water at a time until the desired consistency is reached.
5. Pour the warm sauce over the grated cabbage.
6. Toss to combine thoroughly and serve immediately.
